description: Style Note Stylish, updated roman sandals for the ultra-fashionable! Style these for colour blocking or accessorize with tonal metallic pieces. Product Description Criss crossing synthetic straps with a buckled ankle strap looping around the ankle Padded footbed with embossed branding TPU outsole with a floral lug at the heel Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
